About Me

Chloe’s Persona.

Add photo
Chloe Wu
Product Designer
Bio

I’m a product designer specializing in 0→1 experiences — turning ambiguous problems into clear, useful, and beautiful products. Currently at Jefit, designing for 13M+ users.

Education M.S. IDBT · B.S. CogSci/HCI
Role Product Designer
Location San Jose, CA
Personality · INFJ
IntrovertExtrovert
IntuitiveSensing
ThinkingFeeling
JudgingPerceiving
🌱 Behaviors
Coffee, at least 1×/day
15 minutes of quiet before the day hits—it’s how I calibrate my focus.
Cats — my mental support
My daily reminder that there’s a world beyond pixels. Empathy starts at home.
Nature reset
My go-to space for clearing mental clutter and finding clarity.
Gym, 3–4×/week
Treating design like training. It’s about showing up, staying disciplined, and iterating on the process.
🚀 Motivation
The Bridge-Builder: Thriving at the intersection of product, engineering, and user needs to create a unified vision.
Taming Ambiguity: I love diving into the “messy middle” of a project and emerging with a clear, user-focused path.
Crafting for Impact: I design for trust, turning fleeting user delight into long-term business value.
Legacy Mindset: I don’t just ship features; I leave products and systems more robust and scalable than I found them.
🎯 Goals
Human-centered at scale: Real emotional connection, not just task completion.
Business-aligned design: Every pixel tethered to a measurable outcome.
Systems-first: From 0→1 to robust, scalable design systems.
Cross-functional synergy: A culture built on shared data and empathy.
⚡ Frustrations
Design as decoration: Aesthetics over solving validated user problems.
Designing in a vacuum: Shipping without data or feedback loops.
Team silos: Misalignment slowing meaningful, user-centric work.
Assumption-based decisions: Skipping the “why” before the “how.”
“
I take a holistic approach to design, turning human-centered insights into scalable business value.
Experience

Work Experience
Mar 2024 — Present
Product Designer
Jefit · Full-time
End-to-end product design across Android, iOS, web & wearables for 13M+ users. Shipped Year in Review 2025 (+78% revenue, +124% shares). Spearheaded 0→1 plan adaptation (+42% adoption, +28% D30 retention).
Dec 2023 — Mar 2024
UI/UX Designer
Aware.ai · Internship
Designed and iterated a rewards feature through 5 usability testing rounds, improving task completion by 40%. Delivered end-to-end user flows and wireframes bridging product vision with business objectives.
Oct — Dec 2023
UX Design Strategist
Whatnot · Contract
Designed mobile-to-TV live event experience (+35% cross-platform satisfaction). Drove UX strategy repositioning marketplace as community-first platform.
May — Aug 2023
UX Designer
Hewlett Packard Enterprise · Internship
Analytics dashboard prototypes driving 30% adoption increase. Research recommendations to 50+ stakeholders.
